title: feat: Branded PR comments via hosted GitHub App
body:
## Summary

PR review comments currently appear as `github-actions[bot]`. We want them to appear as `bop-code-review[bot]` for brand recognition.

## Current State

- Created GitHub App `bop-code-review` (App ID: 2690951)
- App is installed on `delightfulhammers` org
- Private key downloaded locally

## Rejected Approach

Requiring users to configure App ID + private key as secrets. Too much friction for a cosmetic feature.

## Recommended Approach

Host the GitHub App credentials server-side and provide a token endpoint:

1. **Backend endpoint**: `POST /api/v1/github/installation-token`
   - Input: `{owner, repo}`
   - Looks up if `bop-code-review` App is installed on that repo
   - If installed, generates and returns an installation token
   - No auth required (App installation IS the authorization)

2. **User experience**:
   - User clicks "Install App" link (one click)
   - Action automatically gets tokens from our backend
   - Comments appear branded with zero configuration

3. **Action changes**:
   - Call backend to get installation token
   - Fall back to `GITHUB_TOKEN` if not installed

## Implementation Notes

- Store App private key in auth-service (or dedicated service)
- Consider caching installation tokens (1 hour TTL)
- Need graceful fallback when App not installed

## Priority

P2 - Nice to have for launch, but not blocking
